Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.terms

Class DivideSignature

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.terms.TermSignature
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.terms.AssociativeTermSignature
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.terms.BinaryTermSignature
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.terms.DivideSignature
public class DivideSignature extends BinaryTermSignature
This class represents the signature for the divide operation.

    appendTermFromTermList(List<TermSignature> indexList, List<TermSignature> newList, int startOffset, int endOffset)
    Appends to new list a copy of this term where each VariableHolder is replaced by its corresponding term, obtained from termList.

    Returns a unchanged deep copy of this signature, where the whole returned tree is a copy from this one.

  • Method Details

    • deepCopy

      public TermSignature deepCopy()
      Description copied from class: TermSignature
      Returns a unchanged deep copy of this signature, where the whole returned tree is a copy from this one.
      Specified by:
      deepCopy in class TermSignature
      Returns:
      an unchanged deep copy of this signature

    • getUnquantifiedTerm

      public TermSignature getUnquantifiedTerm(int startOffset, int endOffset, List<TermSignature> termList)
      Description copied from class: TermSignature
      Returns a copy of this term signature where unquantified sub-trees (with respect to the TermSignature.isQuantified(int, int) method) are replaced by an instance of VariableHolder. Those unquantified sub-trees are added to the given termList.
      Specified by:
      getUnquantifiedTerm in class TermSignature
      Parameters:
      startOffset - the first quantified index
      endOffset - the last quantified index
      termList - the term list where each free term is added
      Returns:
      a copy of this signature where free terms are replaced by VariableHolder

    • getSimpleTerm

      public TermSignature getSimpleTerm(List<TermSignature> termList)
      Description copied from class: TermSignature
      Returns a copy of this term signature where all variable terms are replaced by a VariableHolder. Those variable terms are added to termList.
      Specified by:
      getSimpleTerm in class TermSignature
      Parameters:
      termList - the list where the variables are added
      Returns:
      a copy of this signature.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)

      toString in class AssociativeTermSignature

    • appendTermFromTermList

      public void appendTermFromTermList(List<TermSignature> indexList, List<TermSignature> newList, int startOffset, int endOffset)
      Description copied from class: TermSignature
      Appends to new list a copy of this term where each VariableHolder is replaced by its corresponding term, obtained from termList. The size of the term list must be equivalent to the number of variable holders in this term. This method is similar to TermSignature#appendTermFromIndexList(List, List, boolean)
      Overrides:
      appendTermFromTermList in class AssociativeTermSignature
      Parameters:
      indexList - the list giving what should be put instead of the holders
      newList - the list where to append the obtained term
      startOffset - the first quantified index
      endOffset - the last quantified index

    • getTerm

      public Term getTerm(ClauseContext context)
      Description copied from class: TermSignature
      Returns the instance of Term corresponding to this signature.
      Specified by:
      getTerm in class TermSignature
      Returns:
      the instance of Term corresponding to this signature
